subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify the question-and-answer approach to summary writing
State the rules guiding summary answers
Write brief answers in own words

sections.heading: Approaches
sections.content: The note mentions two approaches to summary writing: the précis and the question-answer type, with focus on the second for WAEC practice.

sections.heading: Rules of Summary
sections.content: Read the passage several times, keep answers short, use your own words, avoid extraneous materials, write answers in sentences and number them, avoid grammatical errors, and be as clear as possible.
